issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases for distribution creation and other operations.

scenarios.name: create-distribution-with-s3-alb-and-lambda-edge
scenarios.rationale: Response A includes the OAC command, Lambda@Edge snippets, and a partial distribution config, whereas Response B lacks the required create-distribution command, OAC command, and proper cache behavior definitions.

scenarios.name: add-custom-error-responses-and-realtime-logs
scenarios.rationale: Response A includes both the required update-distribution and create-realtime-log-config commands, while Response B omits the explicit create-realtime-log-config command.
